basic_details.job_title: IIM Ranchi Gym Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi) has released the official Gym Instructor Notification 2026 on 05 June 2026 at https://www.iimranchi.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIM Ranchi Gym Instructor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Graduate or equivalent degree from a recognized university and rich experience in Gym/Fitness training can attend the walk-in interview on 05 June 2026. The official notification PDF and details for the walk-in procedure are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or its equivalent degree from a recognized university. Rich experience in the field of Gym/Fitness training is essential
qualification.details: Graduate or its equivalent degree from a recognized university. Rich experience in the field of Gym/Fitness training is essential.
